---
name: Chore
about: Track setup, maintenance, documentation, or non-feature work
title: "[Chore] "
labels: ["chore"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal
What maintenance or support task needs to be done?

## Reason
Why is this needed now?

## Scope
What is included?

## Out of scope
What is intentionally excluded?

## Implementation notes
Any repo, tooling, config, CI, docs, or deployment constraints.

## Definition of done
What concrete result should exist?

## Deliverables
What files, config changes, or docs updates are expected?

## Notes for Codex
- Read `README.md` and `AGENTS.md` first.
- Keep changes focused.
- Avoid changing product behavior unless explicitly required.
